reviews.review_description: I'm stuck in a pool area with a monkey in the middle. What do I do?
Can I be mod name is goofy

developer_response.body: i quit making it sorry, yiu might be able to get mod in my new game if you join the discord server, the new game is called w1s, if you send me ur discord username on the reveiw i could send you the server and if you are trustworthy enough i might give you mod!

reviews.review_description: I canвҖҷt even play itвҖҷs not scary IвҖҷm just stuck in a little pit and it resets my name every time i join can you please reply though?
I just jin and its just an infinite loading screen can even play it
Monkey Monke monkey monkey monkey monkey monkey it's so good

developer_response.body: i quit making it, but if you think that is good, you will love my new game w1s! coming out soon!

reviews.review_description: How do I get out of the pool area? If I could get out? I think this should be a pretty fun game developers. Can you please tell me how so I can play
